ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare facility (e.g., Hospital, Medical Centre) */,
  "abn" INTEGER /* Australian Business Number (ABN) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  "suburb" TEXT /* Suburb where the facility is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_records" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the patient is registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medicare_number" INTEGER /* Medicare number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details for the patient */,
  "next_of_kin" TEXT /* Next of kin details for the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who has the appointment */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the appointment is scheduled */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who is assigned to the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time and date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., General Check-up, Specialist Consultation) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., Booked, Arrived, Completed) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the item is stored */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the item */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the item */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who visited the facility */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the patient visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient visit */,
  "reason_for_visit" TEXT /* Reason for the patient visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided during the visit */,
  "discharge_status" TEXT /* Discharge status of the patient (e.g., Discharged, Transferred) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing entry */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient visit for which billing is done */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the visit or service */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "insurance_status" TEXT /* Insurance status of the patient (e.g., Insured, Uninsured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES patient_visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient being referred */,
  "from_facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility from which the referral is made */,
  "to_facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility to which the patient is referred */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date of the referral */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the referral */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the referral (e.g., Pending, Complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_from_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_to_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the prescription is written */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the prescription is issued */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member who wrote the prescription */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the prescription was written */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Name of the medication prescribed */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration for which the medication is prescribed */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who provided the feedback */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the patient visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit for which feedback is provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the patient for the visit */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the patient */,
  "suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions from the patient for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_feedback_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the resource is located */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., MRI machine, hospital bed) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., In use, Available) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the resource (e.g., Scheduled, Overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_resources_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Doctor, Nurse) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_list" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Possible side effects of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patient_records ("patient_id")
)
